zh.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saunders於1487年出生。他和Alice Wilford至少有1個兒子。他去世於1524年享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saunders于1487年出生。他和Alice Wilford至少有1个儿子。他去世于1524年享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Saunders
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey and Kent): variant of Sander , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Sander
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Erna, Erwin, Fritz, Manfred, Bernhard, Dieter, Franz, Gerda, Klaus, Wolfgang.
English (Cumberland), Dutch, German, and Swedish: from the personal name Sander, a shortened form of Alexander . Compare Saunders .
German: topographic name for someone who lived on sandy soil, from Sand 1 + -er, suffix denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saunders was born in 1487. He had at least 1 son with Alice Wilford. He died in 1524, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saunders est né en 1487. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Alice Wilford. Il est décédé en 1524, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saunders wurde 1487 geboren. Er hatte mit Alice Wilford mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1524 im Alter von 37 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saunders è nato il nel 1487. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Alice Wilford. Morì nel 1524, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saundersは1487年に生まれた。彼はAlice Wilfordとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1524年に37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saunders(은)는 1487년 태어났다. 그는 Alice Wilford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1524년 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Saunders nasceu em 1487. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Alice Wilford. Ele faleceu em 1524, com 37 anos.
